subtitle: 3 things you're grateful for, every day

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Shows today's gratitude entries with a 3/3 progress ring, current streak flame counter, mood snapshot, and quick-add floating button. Highlights section shows starred entries from the past week.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal: large text field for the gratitude, horizontal scrolling category chips with icons, intensity slider with emoji anchors (🙂→🥰), mood picker, highlight toggle. Supports adding up to 3 entries in one session without dismissing.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by entry count per day (0=empty, 1-2=light, 3=full). Tapping a day shows that day's entries grouped as cards. Filter by category. Search by keyword.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: category pie chart, mood trend line over 30 days, intensity distribution bar chart, streak history timeline, weekly completion rate, and AI-style insight cards.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries logged today, sorted by creation time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of gratitude entries logged today (target: 3)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayCount / dailyGoal clamped to 0...1 for the progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least 3 entries, counting back from today (breaks if a day has <3)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest streak of consecutive days meeting the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average entries per day over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change: (thisWeekAvg - lastWeekAvg) / lastWeekAvg. Positive = improving consistency

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of entries per category over the last 30 days, sorted descending for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDiversityScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Shannon entropy of category distribution normalized to 0-1. Higher = more diverse gratitude sources

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageMood
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Numeric average of mood levels over last 7 days (amazing=5, rough=1)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, averageMood) for the last 30 days for the mood trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageIntensity
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean intensity rating across all entries in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of days in the last 30 days where the user logged >= 3 entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time total number of gratitude entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalDaysJournaled
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of unique dates that have at least one entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: highlights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entries marked as highlights from the past 7 days for the dashboard carousel

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Computed insight cards: top category this week, streak milestone approaching, mood-gratitude correlation, consistency nudge, category diversity tip

viewModelComputedProperties.name: streakHistory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All historical streaks of 3+ days for the streak timeline visualization

dailyGoal.description: Number of gratitude entries to log per day. Research-backed default of 3 items per the Seligman three-good-things exercise.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as 'complete' if the user logs at least 3 gratitude entries (meeting the daily goal). The streak increments for each consecutive calendar day that is complete. Today counts toward the streak if goal is met; if not yet met today, the streak is calculated from yesterday backward. Missing a single day resets the streak to 0.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trends: (1) Weekly completion rate vs previous week — are they building consistency? (2) Mood trend — 7-day rolling average of mood mapped to 1-5 scale, plotted over 30 days. (3) Category shift — compare top-3 categories this week vs last week to surface changes in gratitude focus. (4) Intensity trend — are they feeling more deeply grateful over time? 14-day rolling average of intensity.
insights: streak_milestone: When within 2 days of a milestone (7, 14, 30, 60, 100, 365), show encouragement with days remaining
category_concentration: If >60% of entries are one category, suggest exploring other areas of life
mood_correlation: When 2+ week data exists, compute correlation between daily entry count and mood; surface if positive correlation detected
consistency_pattern: Identify which days of the week have lowest completion rates and suggest setting reminders
gratitude_growth: Compare average intensity this month vs last month; celebrate if increasing
highlight_reflection: On weekends, surface 3 random highlights from the past month for re-reading
diversity_nudge: If categoryDiversityScore < 0.4 for 2+ weeks, suggest a specific under-represented category to try
longest_streak_beat: Celebrate immediately when current streak exceeds the previous longest streak
